message:
🌱 Add lima: docs: discourage `/tmp/lima` on shared hosts (and deprecate mission (#1248)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "lima-3648-docs-discourage-tmp-lima-on-shared-hosts-and-deprecate-it",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "lima: docs: discourage `/tmp/lima` on shared hosts (and deprecate it?)",
+    "description": "docs: discourage `/tmp/lima` on shared hosts (and deprecate it?). Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "upgrade",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify lima upgrade symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your lima installation:\n```bash\nlimactl --version\nlimactl list\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review lima configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant lima configuration:\nUsing `/tmp/lima` is discouraged on shared hosts, as another user on the host can peek/poke the directory.\n\nMaybe we should deprecate and remove it in v2.0 ?\nA user can still enable the directory by specifying `--mount /tmp/lima:w`."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for docs: discourage `/tmp/lima` on shared hosts (and deprecate…",
+        "description": "The major version is now updated to highlight the introduction of the pluggable VM driver framework.\n\nSee:\n- #3712\n```yaml\nmounts:\n- location: \"{{.GlobalTempDir}}/lima\"\n  mountPoint: /tmp/lima\n  writable: true\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade lima to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade lima:\n```bash\n# Check current version\nlimactl --version\n# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/lima-vm/lima\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm docs: discourage `/tmp/lima` on shared hosts (and… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest lima to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The major version is now updated to highlight the introduction of the pluggable VM driver framework.\n\nSee:\n- #3712",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "mounts:\n- location: \"{{.GlobalTempDir}}/lima\"\n  mountPoint: /tmp/lima\n  writable: true",
+        "limactl create -y template://ubuntu _default/temp-mount.yaml",
+        "base:\n- ubuntu.yaml\n- _default/mounts.yaml\n- _default/temp-mount.yaml"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "lima",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "lima"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/lima-vm/lima/issues/3648",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/lima-vm/lima",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/lima-vm/lima/pull/3731"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 20,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "limactl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working lima installation or development environment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-16T06:43:14.804Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
